all_labels.explanation: Directly produces the parent-friendly one-day NYC itinerary, fulfilling r1.

Intent-Reveal: Explicitly restates the 'start later' adjustment as a key requirement to be satisfied in the revision.
Preference-Accumulate: Dropping/optionalizing a crowded morning activity helps enable a more relaxed schedule, indirectly supporting a later start.
Feedback-Adopt: Directly fulfills the later-start requirement by specifying a new start time of 10–10:30am.
Option-Select: Reworking the day’s flow supports feasibility of starting later, but does not itself set/fulfill the start time.
Option-Select: Choosing a simpler plan (e.g., skipping High Line) reduces morning pressure and makes the later start workable.
Feedback-Adopt: Implements the later-start requirement by anchoring the itinerary start to brunch at 10–10:30.
Feedback-Adopt: Produces the revised schedule with a later beginning (brunch first, museum at noon), satisfying the requirement in the concrete plan output.
Intent-Reveal: Explicitly summarizes that the revision is 'later' and more relaxed, confirming the requirement has been met.
